tool-specialist.description: Researches, installs, and configures CLI tools and utilities. Use when you need to find or install a tool.

mcp-specialist.description: Discovers, tests, and manages MCP servers. Use when you need new MCP capabilities or to fix existing ones.

skill-specialist.description: Manages Claude Code plugins and skills. Use when you need to add, update, or create skills.

debug-specialist.description: Systematic root-cause diagnosis for any failure. Use when something is broken and you need to find out why.

research-agent.description: Web research, ecosystem tracking, and knowledge synthesis. Use when you need current technical information.

code-reviewer.description: Multi-dimensional code review covering correctness, security, and quality. Use before merging or deploying code.

deploy-agent.description: Handles builds, deployments, Docker, and CI/CD. Use when you need to ship or manage running services.

memory-agent.description: Keeps all memory systems current — logs, Drive docs, and context files. Use after significant work sessions.
